productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Gold Heels
description: Add bling to your outfit in ease with this pair of golden sandals from carlton london. The stylish snake print on the straps and stainless steel heel make this a durable and stylish pair of footwear. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic leather straps with snake print Ankle strap has a buckle closure Synthetic leather footbed with a foot patch Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel in stainless steel with a rubber patch Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
